title: arenaria congesta var. aculeata
intro: Arenaria congesta var. aculeata, also known as the spiny sandwort or prickly sandwort, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and protect the skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that help to prevent infections. Arenaria congesta var. aculeata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
